activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit (LC) exception applies; only origin verification
EU origin normalization and treatment of multiple EU countries

consignor.motivation: LC exception active according to rule 2.2. Only origin verification applies, consignor check is NOT_APPLICABLE.

consignee.certificate_value: SHANDONG PUBLISHING FOREIGN TRADE COMPANY LIMITED
consignee.invoice_value: SHANDONG PUBLISHING FOREIGN TRADE COMPANY LIMITED
consignee.motivation: LC exception active according to rule 2.2. Only origin verification applies, consignee check is NOT_APPLICABLE.

goods_description.certificate_value: SODRA BLUE Z SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP
goods_description.invoice_value: COMMODITY: SODRA BLUE Z SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP
goods_description.motivation: LC exception active according to rule 2.2. Only origin verification applies, goods description check is NOT_APPLICABLE.

quantity.motivation: LC exception active according to rule 2.2. Only origin verification applies, quantity check is NOT_APPLICABLE.

origin.motivation: Certificate origin 'SWEDEN' is explicitly confirmed in invoice origin field 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN'. EU origin normalization applies and is consistent with certificate and invoice data. Thus, origin verification MATCHES.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: LC exception is active due to presence of explicit L/C reference in certificate, limiting verifications to origin only. Origin matches between certificate and invoice. Other control points are not applicable. However, due to LC exception and conservative principle, total result is MANUAL_REVIEW.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet innehåller en uttrycklig hänvisning till ett Letter of Credit (L/C), vilket innebär att endast ursprungsland verifieras. Ursprungslandet 'Sweden' stämmer mellan certifikat och faktura. Övriga kontrollpunkter är undantagna och verifieringen kräver manuell granskning enligt regelverket.
